=== Metadata ===
Effect version: 3.19.19

/.src/missingReturnYieldStar.ts(5,28): suggestion TS377014: This generator returns an Effect-able value directly, which produces a nested `Effect<Effect<...>>`. If the intended result is the inner Effect value, `return yield*` represents that form. effect(returnEffectInGen)
/.src/missingReturnYieldStar.ts(12,7): error TS377006: This Effect never succeeds; using `return yield*` preserves a definitive generator exit point for type narrowing and tooling support. effect(missingReturnYieldStar)
/.src/missingReturnYieldStar.ts(19,5): error TS377006: This Effect never succeeds; using `return yield*` preserves a definitive generator exit point for type narrowing and tooling support. effect(missingReturnYieldStar)
/.src/missingReturnYieldStar.ts(20,5): error TS377006: This Effect never succeeds; using `return yield*` preserves a definitive generator exit point for type narrowing and tooling support. effect(missingReturnYieldStar)


==== /.src/missingReturnYieldStar.ts (4 errors) ====
    // @effect-v3
    import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"
    
    export const shouldNotComplain = Effect.gen(function*() {
      if (Math.random() < 0.5) return Effect.succeed(42)
                               ~~~~~~
!!! suggestion TS377014: This generator returns an Effect-able value directly, which produces a nested `Effect<Effect<...>>`. If the intended result is the inner Effect value, `return yield*` represents that form. effect(returnEffectInGen)
      return yield* Effect.fail("no.")
    })
    
    export const shouldComplain = (n: number) =>
      Effect.gen(function*() {
        if (n === 0) {
          yield* Effect.fail("no zero!")
          ~~~~~
!!! error TS377006: This Effect never succeeds; using `return yield*` preserves a definitive generator exit point for type narrowing and tooling support. effect(missingReturnYieldStar)
        }
        return n / 1
      })
    
    export const shouldComplainOther = (n: number) =>
      Effect.gen(function*() {
        yield* Effect.interrupt
        ~~~~~
!!! error TS377006: This Effect never succeeds; using `return yield*` preserves a definitive generator exit point for type narrowing and tooling support. effect(missingReturnYieldStar)
        yield* Effect.die("lol")
        ~~~~~
!!! error TS377006: This Effect never succeeds; using `return yield*` preserves a definitive generator exit point for type narrowing and tooling support. effect(missingReturnYieldStar)
        return n / 1
      })
    
    export const shouldNotComplainThrows = Effect.gen(function*() {
      throw yield* Effect.fail(42)
      return 42
    })
